creator: tmarjeski@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Fernando Apesteguía from comment #1)
Hi Fernando,
I suppose there is no good reason other than it's a very small implementation and, in my own opinion, pretty fun. No worries if it is not accepted! Thanks.

Also, I am wondering - does a patch like this would need to specify `ncurses`? (Since it's an included library)
